note: This trainer counts optimizer.step() calls 1:1 with --epochs (run_training() does exactly one gradient step per epoch loop iteration: one synthetic mini-batch concatenated with one sampled real mini-batch). So 'epoch' in this trainer's CLI IS the 'step' unit the spec's probe formula refers to.

probe_gate_after_100_steps.note: already nonzero after 100 steps -- promising early signal, not a gate pass
